name: Ginger Sesame Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the garlic, ginger, rice wine vinegar, soy sauce, and sesame oil in a food processor. Process until well combined.
2. Add the tahini to the food processor and pulse until the dressing is thick.
3. Carefully add the vegetable oil in a thin stream while continuing to process until the dressing is emulsified.
4. If the dressing appears too thick, gradually add water, one tablespoon at a time, until it reaches the desired consistency.
